abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Pulled in My Wake
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model declares the Charge action, it may drain a (soulstone) to choose an ally within 2" of itself. After completing the Charge, place the chosen model in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Ferryman's Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, this model may move up to 2".

triggers.name: Whirlpool
triggers.text: Enemy models within 1" of the target are placed within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Lost in the Fog
actions.effects: Target either gains a Staggered token, or this model may move it up to 4".

triggers.name: Weigh Down
triggers.text: Target must have a friendly upgrade attached. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Ghostly Ram
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. This model declares the Charge action, ignoring the once per activation restriction.
